howItWorks.intro: This chinese zodiac calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Animal = Birth Year mod 12 (mapped to animal cycle)
Element = Birth Year mod 10 (mapped to element cycle)
Compatibility based on traditional trine groupings
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What is the Chinese zodiac?
faq.answer: The Chinese zodiac is a 12-year cycle, with each year represented by an animal: Rat, Ox, Tiger, Rabbit, Dragon, Snake, Horse, Goat, Monkey, Rooster, Dog, and Pig. Your birth year determines your sign.

faq.question: What do the five elements mean?
faq.answer: Each zodiac year is also associated with one of five elements: Metal, Water, Wood, Fire, or Earth. The element adds nuance to your personality. The full cycle (12 animals × 5 elements) repeats every 60 years.

faq.question: Is Chinese zodiac based on the solar or lunar calendar?
faq.answer: The Chinese zodiac follows the lunar calendar. Chinese New Year falls between January 21 and February 20. If born in January or early February, you may belong to the previous year's animal.

faq.question: Is the Chinese Zodiac Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Chinese Zodiac Calculator?
sections.body: The Chinese Zodiac Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your birth year, partner's birth year, you get instant results including your zodiac animal, your element, key traits. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting your zodiac animal right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your birth year and need to find the right your zodiac animal. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
